ClientSideComponent.Name: POL RSS Gallery
ClientSideComponent.ComponentManifest: {"id":"2b8f84b4-3b97-49d9-b352-9282b3ee05ae","alias":"PolRssGalleryWebPart","componentType":"WebPart","version":"1.3.0","manifestVersion":2,"supportsFullBleed":true,"supportedHosts":["SharePointWebPart","SharePointFullPage"],"supportsThemeVariants":true,"preconfiguredEntries":[{"groupId":"5c03119e-3074-46fd-976b-c60198311f70","group":{"default":"Advanced"},"title":{"default":"POL RSS Gallery","nb-no":"POL RSS-Galleri"},"description":{"default":"Displays content from an RSS feed in banner, card or list layout.","nb-no":"Viser innhold fra en RSS-feed i banner-, kort- eller listevisning."},"officeFabricIconFontName":"News","properties":{"feedUrl":"https://www.nrk.no/toppsaker.rss","layout":"card","autoscroll":true,"interval":5,"maxItems":6,"forceFallbackImage":false,"fallbackImageUrl":"https://picsum.photos/800/600"}}],"loaderConfig":{"internalModuleBaseUrls":["HTTPS://SPCLIENTSIDEASSETLIBRARY/"],"entryModuleId":"pol-rss-gallery-web-part","scriptResources":{"pol-rss-gallery-web-part":{"type":"path","path":"pol-rss-gallery-web-part_262fba7771c6d4b9e9d2.js"},"react":{"type":"component","id":"0d910c1c-13b9-4e1c-9aa4-b008c5e42d7d","version":"17.0.1"},"react-dom":{"type":"component","id":"aa0a46ec-1505-43cd-a44a-93f3a5aa460a","version":"17.0.1"},"@microsoft/sp-property-pane":{"type":"component","id":"f9e737b7-f0df-4597-ba8c-3060f82380db","version":"1.21.1"},"@microsoft/sp-webpart-base":{"type":"component","id":"974a7777-0990-4136-8fa6-95d80114c2e0","version":"1.21.1"},"RssFeedWebPartStrings":{"type":"localizedPath","paths":{"en-US":"RssFeedWebPartStrings_en-us_5a145b8f38c2978ae1278e32f6e688cc.js","nb-NO":"RssFeedWebPartStrings_nb-no_c48dc966e9c3e6080c803941e25762f2.js","nn-NO":"RssFeedWebPartStrings_nn-no_d1e91e6731b6e72f7db930ca6082c139.js"},"defaultPath":"RssFeedWebPartStrings_en-us_5a145b8f38c2978ae1278e32f6e688cc.js"},"@microsoft/sp-component-base":{"type":"component","id":"467dc675-7cc5-4709-8aac-78e3b71bd2f6","version":"1.21.1"},"@microsoft/sp-http":{"type":"component","id":"c07208f0-ea3b-4c1a-9965-ac1b825211a6","version":"1.21.1"},"@microsoft/sp-core-library":{"type":"component","id":"7263c7d0-1d6a-45ec-8d85-d4d1d234171b","version":"1.21.1"}}}}
